checks.name: all_builtin_packs_are_signed_and_mutation_tested
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
from factoryline.capability_packs import builtin_packs,validate_pack,target_inventory
from factoryline.target_compiler import create_target_from_prompt
items=builtin_packs(); assert len(items)==29; assert {item['kind'] for item in items}=={'target','surface','language','capability','data','ops'}; assert set(target_inventory())=={'cli','api','mcp','worker','web','mobile','agent-ui'}
for item in items:
 result=validate_pack(Path(item['path'])); assert result['valid'] and result['signature']['verified']; assert result['mutations']['attempted']==10 and result['mutations']['rejected']==10
with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
 result=create_target_from_prompt('Build an API',target='api',out_dir=Path(d)/'api'); assert result['deployment']['external_effects_authorized'] is False

checks.name: compatible_packs_compose_without_effect_authority
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
from factoryline.capability_packs import BUILTIN_ROOT,compose_packs
with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
 result=compose_packs([BUILTIN_ROOT/'target-web',BUILTIN_ROOT/'surface-react',BUILTIN_ROOT/'language-typescript',BUILTIN_ROOT/'capability-accessibility'],Path(d),name='web-react'); assert result['marker']=='PACK_COMPOSITION_VERIFIED'; assert result['pack_count']==4; assert not any(result['authority'].values()); assert Path(result['path']).is_file()

checks.name: tamper_and_hollow_canary_fail_closed
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
import json,shutil
from factoryline.capability_packs import BUILTIN_ROOT,validate_pack
with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
 root=Path(d)/'pack'; shutil.copytree(BUILTIN_ROOT/'target-worker',root); manifest=json.loads((root/'pack.yaml').read_text()); manifest['summary']='tampered'; (root/'pack.yaml').write_text(json.dumps(manifest)); result=validate_pack(root); assert not result['valid'] and result['failure']['causal_code']=='PACK_VALIDATION_FAILED'

checks.name: verified_install_refuses_implicit_replacement
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
from factoryline.capability_packs import BUILTIN_ROOT,CapabilityPackError,install_pack
with TemporaryDirectory() as d:
 root=Path(d); result=install_pack(BUILTIN_ROOT/'target-mobile',root); assert result['marker']=='PACK_INSTALLED_VERIFIED'
 try:
  install_pack(BUILTIN_ROOT/'target-mobile',root); raise AssertionError('replacement allowed')
 except CapabilityPackError as exc: assert exc.code=='PACK_EXISTS'
